response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese dialogue and song lyrics from the reference JSON and on-screen text. The video starts with a dialogue segment where Kazama Iroha talks about her new outfit and previous performances, followed by a performance of 'Black Rock Shooter' with Ookami Mio. Timestamps are precisely aligned with the vocal audio. English translations provide contextual accuracy for terms like 'ござる' (I/me) and 'ラプラス殿' (La+-dono).

subtitles.original: というわけで！
subtitles.english: So then!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、新衣装になりました！
subtitles.english: Everyone, I've got a new outfit!

subtitles.original: どうですかー？
subtitles.english: How is it?

subtitles.original: かっこいいですかー？
subtitles.english: Is it cool?

subtitles.original: なんと、今回は
subtitles.english: You see, this time

subtitles.original: ダンスを頑張ると決めた、その時から決めていた...
subtitles.english: I decided to work hard on dancing, and since then I've decided...

subtitles.original: ちょっとカッコいい系のダンス衣装になってみました！
subtitles.english: to try a slightly cool-style dance outfit!

subtitles.original: イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 皆さん写真いっぱい撮って撮って撮って撮って！
subtitles.english: Everyone, take lots of pictures, take them, take them!

subtitles.original: イエーイ、かっこいいでしょう？
subtitles.english: Yay, isn't it cool?

subtitles.original: さっきから「可愛い」ばっかなんだけど、かっこいいはどこ行ったんだよ！
subtitles.english: You've only been saying "cute", where did the "cool" go?!

subtitles.original: おい！かっこいいはどこ行ったんだよ！
subtitles.english: Hey! Where did the "cool" go?!

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで新衣装になりました。
subtitles.english: Okay! So, that's the new outfit.

subtitles.original: ゲストパートの「絶対アイドル辞めないで」から、
subtitles.english: From the guest part "Zettai Idol Yamenaide",

subtitles.original: あの、ソロになりまして、
subtitles.english: well, I went solo,

subtitles.original: 「アンデッド」「ヒビカセ」と続けてお送りさせていただきました。
subtitles.english: and performed "Undead" and "Hibikase" back-to-back.

subtitles.original: どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: めっちゃ頑張って、
subtitles.english: I worked really hard,

subtitles.original: 「足千切れそう」ってそういうことです、本当に。
subtitles.english: and my legs felt like they were gonna fall off, for real.

subtitles.original: たくさん今回は
subtitles.english: This time, for the transformation,

subtitles.original: 変身のために飛びました。足が千切れそうです。
subtitles.english: I jumped a lot. My legs feel like they're falling off.

subtitles.original: 「絶対アイドル辞めないで」も、先輩方、そしてラプラス殿も来てくれて、
subtitles.english: For "Zettai Idol Yamenaide", my seniors and La+-dono came out,

subtitles.original: ありがとう！激ムズだったね、本当に。
subtitles.english: thank you! It was super tough, really.

subtitles.original: 本当に激ムズでしたね。
subtitles.english: It really was super tough.

subtitles.original: 皆さん、一緒に頑張ってくださり、本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for working hard with me!

subtitles.original: そしてですね、この後もまだまだゲストさんたくさん呼んでおります！
subtitles.english: And also, I've invited many more guests after this!

subtitles.original: そして、ござるも、
subtitles.english: And, I also...

subtitles.original: 実はこのカラーリングだけじゃないんですよ！
subtitles.english: actually have more than just this coloring!

subtitles.original: なので、そちらも公開していくので、皆様お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: So I'll be revealing that too, please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: それでは、次はゲストさんと一緒に歌わせていただきます。
subtitles.english: Now, for the next song, I'll be singing with a guest.

subtitles.original: それでは、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Here it is!

subtitles.original: Black Rock Shooter
subtitles.english: Black Rock Shooter

subtitles.original: どこへ行ったの？
subtitles.english: Where did you go?

subtitles.original: 聞こえますか？
subtitles.english: Can you hear me?

subtitles.original: あとどれだけ叫べばいいのだろう
subtitles.english: How much more do I have to scream?

subtitles.original: あとどれだけ泣けばいいのだろう
subtitles.english: How much more do I have to cry?

subtitles.original: もうやめて わたしはもう走れない
subtitles.english: Stop it already, I can't run anymore

subtitles.original: いつか夢見た世界が閉じる
subtitles.english: The world I once dreamed of is closing

subtitles.original: 真っ暗で明かりもない
subtitles.english: It's pitch black with no light

subtitles.original: 崩れかけたこの道で
subtitles.english: On this crumbling road

subtitles.original: あるはずもないあの時の希望が見えた気がした
subtitles.english: I felt like I saw the hope from that time that shouldn't exist

subtitles.original: どうして
subtitles.english: Why?

subtitles.original: Black Rock Shooter
subtitles.english: Black Rock Shooter

subtitles.original: 懐かしい記憶
subtitles.english: Nostalgic memories

subtitles.original: ただ楽しかったあの頃を
subtitles.english: Those days when it was just fun

subtitles.original: Black Rock Shooter
subtitles.english: Black Rock Shooter

subtitles.original: でも動けないよ
subtitles.english: But I can't move

subtitles.original: 闇を駆ける星に願いを
subtitles.english: A wish to the star racing through the darkness

subtitles.original: もう一度だけ走るから
subtitles.english: Because I'll run just one more time

subtitles.original: 怖くて震える声でつぶやく
subtitles.english: I whisper in a voice trembling with fear

subtitles.original: わたしの名前を呼んで
subtitles.english: Call my name

subtitles.original: 夜明けを抱く空 境界線までの距離
subtitles.english: The sky embracing the dawn, the distance to the boundary line

subtitles.original: あと一歩届かない
subtitles.english: One more step and I won't reach it

subtitles.original: こらえた涙があふれそうなの
subtitles.english: The tears I held back are about to overflow

subtitles.original: 今下を向かないで 止まってしまう
subtitles.english: Don't look down now, or you'll stop

subtitles.original: 未来を生きていたいんだ わかったの
subtitles.english: I want to live in the future, I understand now

subtitles.original: 思い出して 強く強く信じるの
subtitles.english: Remember, believe strongly, strongly

subtitles.original: そうよ
subtitles.english: That's right

subtitles.original: Black Rock Shooter
subtitles.english: Black Rock Shooter

subtitles.original: 優しい匂い
subtitles.english: A gentle scent

subtitles.original: 痛いよ 辛いよ
subtitles.english: It hurts, it's hard

subtitles.original: 飲み込む言葉
subtitles.english: Words I swallow
